ariaSpec.usage: Indicates that the pager has its own keyboard navigation implemented.
Clarifies the role of the Pager.
Announces the currently selected page and the number of available pages.
Specifies the role of the navigation element.
Present when the navigation button is non-interactive.
Specifies the purpose of each navigation button.
Specifies the purpose of each page link, e.g., Page 6.
Present on the currently selected page element.
The DropDownList requires a label to specify its purpose.
The input requires a label to specify its purpose.

kbSpec.behavior: Loads the first page of data if the current page is not the first one.
Loads the last page of data if the current page is not the last one.
Navigates to the next focusable element on the page.
Navigates to the previous focusable element on the page.
Loads the previous page of data, if any.
Loads the next page of data, if any.
Loads the previous page of data, if any.
Loads the next page of data, if any.
Moves the focus back to the wrapper element. Deactivates the inner Pager navigation.
Navigates to the next focusable element in the Pager. If the current focus is on the last element, moves the focus to the first focusable item in the component.
Navigates to the previous focusable element in the Pager. If the current focus is on the first element, moves the focus to the last focusable item in the component.
For button items, and Pager input executes the currently focused action (page change).
